title: Vein Miner Enchantment
description: This datapack adds your world Vein Mine enchantment and mining system
body:
# VeinMiner datapack

### Information
This datapack adds your game a new Enchantment Vein Mine. With this enchantment you can easily break blocks. You can obtain this enchantment via using Powered Enchanting table on your pickaxes, axes or shovels.

### How To Use

When you break block via Vein Mine enchanted tool if you are sneaking (as default Holding L-shift) system will break around blocks automatically. You can obtain this enchantment via powered enchanting table.

### Limits
- If you break block with non-suitable tool (Like breaking stone with shovel) system will not check this situation and break block.
- Only 92 type of blocks will be broken by system. These are:

    -  acacia log
    -  amethyst block
    -  budding amethyst
    -  ancient debris
    -  andesite
    -  basalt
    -  birch log
    -  blackstone
    -  bone block
    -  bricks
    -  brown mushroom block
    -  cherry log
    -  coal block
    -  coal ore
    -  cobbled deepslate
    -  cobblestone
    -  copper ore
    -  crimson nylium
    -  crimson stem
    -  crying obsidian
    -  dark oak log
    -  dark prismarine
    -  deepslate coal ore
    -  deepslate copper ore
    -  deepslate diamond ore
    -  deepslate emerald ore
    -  deepslate gold ore
    -  deepslate iron ore
    -  deepslate lapis ore
    -  deepslate redstone ore
    -  deepslate
    -  deepslate bricks
    -  diamond block
    -  diamond ore
    -  diorite
    -  dirt
    -  emerald block
    -  emerald ore
    -  end stone
    -  glowstone
    -  gold block
    -  gold ore
    -  granite
    -  grass block
    -  iron bars
    -  iron block
    -  iron ore
    -  jungle log
    -  lapis block
    -  lapis ore
    -  magma block
    -  mangrove log
    -  mangrove roots
    -  moss block
    -  mossy cobblestone
    -  mossy stone bricks
    -  muddy mangrove roots
    -  mushroom stem
    -  nether bricks
    -  nether gold ore
    -  netherite block
    -  nether quartz ore
    -  netherrack
    -  nether wart block
    -  oak log
    -  obsidian
    -  pale oak log
    -  prismarine
    -  prismarine bricks
    -  purpur block
    -  quartz block
    -  raw copper block
    -  raw gold block
    -  raw iron block
    -  red mushroom block
    -  red sandstone
    -  smooth red sandstone
    -  redstone block
    -  redstone ore
    -  sandstone
    -  shroomlight
    -  smooth sandstone
    -  soul sand
    -  soul soil
    -  spruce log
    -  stone
    -  stone bricks
    -  tuff
    -  tuff bricks
    -  warped wart block
    -  warped nylium
    -  warped stem


### Installation
1- Move Datapack file to your world's datapack folder

2- Join your world (if you didnt yet)

3- Check datapack with using '/datapack list' command.

4- If datapack is activated you will find datapack on activated list, if not; use '/datapack enable <filename>' commad for activate

5- Leave your world (Shut down server if you use) then rejoin again (start server again)

6- While you rejoin you will see Experimental settings warning, then join your world.

7- Enjoy your game :)



### Uninstallation
1- Use '/datapack disable <filename>' command for disable datapack

2- Rejoin your world (restart your server).
